title: limnorchis stricta
side_effects: Limnorchis stricta can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In severe cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to kidney damage and even kidney failure. Additionally, improper use of limnorchis stricta may also cause allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, itching, and swelling. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid these potential side effects.
